about.heading: About DrishiQ
about.description: DrishiQ is an invite-only platform designed for individuals who seek clarity in their decision-making process. We combine AI-powered insights with human wisdom to help you navigate complex situations and unlock your potential.
about.discovery_message: Discover how DrishiQ can help you see through the challenge and make better decisions.
